name: @hojai/logistics
description: Logistics SDK - Client for KHAIRMOVE logistics aggregator (port 4604) — multi-carrier shipping (Delhivery, BlueDart, DTDC, FedEx, DHL) + autonomous logistics.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
